flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 18 pp at Gwinnett College-Lilburn vs the 2003–2007 baseline (40.9% vs 58.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Gwinnett College-Lilburn rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.9k → $11.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Gwinnett College-Lilburn rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.9k → $11.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gwinnett College-Lilburn fell 100% between 2019 and 2022 (16.5% → 0.0%).
